goals.title: Browse facet data layer
goals.objective: Add Radio Browser-backed browse/facet data support for genres/tags, countries/locations, and languages. Prefer cleaned, count-aware browse lists over raw noisy dumps, and preserve existing text search behavior.
goals.evidence: Implemented BrowseFacet model plus RadioBrowserClient browse_facets and browse_stations data-layer methods. Verification: uv run pytest tests\\test_radio_browser.py tests\\test_models.py (9 passed); uv run pytest (82 passed); uv run ruff check .; live Radio Browser facet smoke returned location/genre/language rows.

goals.title: Quality scoring and station ranking
goals.objective: Create deterministic quality labeling/ranking that uses working status, bitrate, codec, click trend/popularity, and station metadata so discovery favors reliable high-quality streams without AI recommendations.
goals.evidence: Implemented deterministic discovery_quality_score/discovery_quality_label on Station and discovery_sorted browse result ordering. Verification: uv run pytest tests\\test_radio_browser.py tests\\test_models.py (11 passed); uv run pytest (84 passed); uv run ruff check .

goals.title: Accessible browse UI integration
goals.objective: Design and implement the exact wxPython browse UI shape, delegated to OMX, as long as it is keyboard-first, screen-reader friendly, and lets users browse genre, location, and language paths into playable station results.
goals.evidence: Implemented keyboard-first Browse Stations panel with category choice, load choices, browse choices, and Browse selected action wired into existing station results/playback flow. Verification: uv run pytest tests\\test_app.py tests\\test_radio_browser.py tests\\test_models.py (22 passed); uv run pytest (84 passed); uv run ruff check .

goals.title: End-to-end discovery verification
goals.objective: Add focused tests for browse query/list behavior, quality ranking/labeling, accessible UI expectations, and regression coverage for existing search and playback flows; verify with uv run pytest and uv run ruff check .
goals.evidence: Implemented and verified Station Scout discovery browsing end to end: BrowseFacet data layer, quality scoring/ranking, accessible Browse Stations UI, focused tests, full verification, cleanup pass, and clean code review. Verification: uv run pytest (84 passed); uv run ruff check .; uv run python -m build; git diff --check; live Radio Browser browse smoke.

codexObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-browse-facet-data-layer Browse facet data layer; G002-quality-scoring-and-station-ranking Quality scoring and station ranking; G003-accessible-browse-ui-integration Accessible browse UI integration; G004-end-to-end-discovery-verification End-to-end discovery verification
